arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EMR containers virtual cluster.

container_provider.description: Details of the container provider, including the EKS cluster information and type.

created_at.description: The timestamp indicating when the EMR containers virtual cluster was created.

id.description: The unique identifier of the EMR containers virtual cluster.

name.description: The name of the EMR containers virtual cluster.

state.description: The current state of the EMR containers virtual cluster.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the EMR containers virtual cluster.
